recommendations.title: The Jungle Bunch
recommendations.overview: Maurice may look like a penguin - but he's a real tiger inside! Raised by a tigress, he's the clumsiest kung-fu master ever. Along with his friends, The Jungle Bunch, he intends to maintain order and justice in the jungle, as his mother did before he

recommendations.title: Jungle Run
recommendations.overview: A brother and sister's journey into the jungle to find their missing father.

recommendations.title: The Jungle Book
recommendations.overview: After a threat from the tiger Shere Khan, Mowgli, a man-cub fostered by wolves, is forced to flee the jungle, and he embarks on a journey of self-discovery with the help of the panther, Bagheera, and the free-spirited bear, Baloo.

recommendations.title: Gwendoline
recommendations.overview: A beautiful woman hires an intrepid adventurer to help find her father, who has disappeared in the jungle while searching for a rare and priceless butterfly. Along the way they run into cannibals, a race of Amazon warriors and all the usual attractio

recommendations.title: Iceman
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Science Fiction, Comedy, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: An imperial guard and his three traitorous childhood friends ordered to hunt him down get accidentally buried and kept frozen in time. 400 years later, they are defrosted continuing the battle they left behind.

recommendations.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth
recommendations.overview: An Edinburgh professor and assorted colleagues follow an explorer's trail down an extinct Icelandic volcano to the earth's center.

recommendations.title: The Cat Returns
recommendations.overview: Young Haru rescues a cat from being run over, but soon learns it's no ordinary feline; it happens to be the Prince of the Cats.

recommendations.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding 2
recommendations.overview: The continuing adventures of the Portokalos family. A follow-up to the 2002 comedy, "My Big Fat Greek Wedding."

recommendations.title: The Ewok Adventure
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Wicket the Ewok and his friends agree to help two shipwrecked human children, Mace and Cindel, on a quest to find their parents.

recommendations.title: Mowgli: Legend of the Jungle
recommendations.overview: A human child raised by wolves, must face off against a menacing tiger named Shere Khan, as well as his own origins.
